1.0.0.readme:
Continuwuity

Continuwuity is a Matrix homeserver written in Rust. It's the official community continuation of the conduwuit homeserver.

run_as_context.description: Container [continuwuity] can run as any non-root user and group.

chart_metadata.description: Continuwuity, the official community driven continuation of conduwuit & Conduit, focusing on user experience and new features.
chart_metadata.title: Continuwuity
chart_metadata.name: continuwuity

run_as_context.description: Container [continuwuity] can run as any non-root user and group.

app_metadata.description: Continuwuity, the official community driven continuation of conduwuit & Conduit, focusing on user experience and new features.

groups.name: User and Group Configuration
groups.description: Configure User and Group for Continuwuity

attrs.label: Server Name
attrs.description:
The server name to use for your Continuwuity instance.
This is used for federation and should be a fully qualified domain name.

attrs.label: Enable Registration
attrs.description:
Allow users to register for an account
on your Continuwuity instance.

attrs.label: Registration Token
attrs.description:
A registration token is required
when registration is allowed.

attrs.label: Enable Federation
attrs.description:
Allow your Continuwuity instance to federate
with other Matrix servers.

attrs.label: Trusted Servers
attrs.description: A list of trusted servers for federation.

attrs.label: User ID
attrs.description: The user id that Continuwuity files will be owned by.
The group id that Continuwuity files will be owned by.
attrs.label: Group ID
Port Bind Mode

enum.description: Publish port on the host for external access
Expose port for inter-container communication
None

attrs.description:
The port bind mode.</br>
- Publish: The port will be published on the host for external access.</br>
- Expose: The port will be exposed for inter-container communication.</br>
- None: The port will not be exposed or published.</br>
Note: If the Dockerfile defines an EXPOSE directive,
the port will still be exposed for inter-container communication regardless of this setting.

attrs.label: Host IPs
attrs.description: IPs on the host to bind this port
The docker networks to join

attrs.label: Name
attrs.description:
The name of the network to join.</br>
The network must already exist.
The containers to add to this network.

enum.description: continuwuity

attrs.label: Aliases (Optional)
attrs.description: The network aliases to use for this container on this network.
The network interface name to use for this network
attrs.label: Interface Name (Optional)
MAC Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The MAC address to use for this network interface.
The IPv4 address to use for this network interface.
attrs.label: IPv4 Address (Optional)

attrs.description: The IPv6 address to use for this network interface.
attrs.label: IPv6 Address (Optional)
Gateway Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates the priority of the gateway for this network interface.
Indicates in which order Compose connects the service's containers to its networks.
attrs.label: Priority (Optional)
Containers
Networks

enum.description: Host Path (Path that already exists on the system)

Continuwuity
